records.ety: [F., fr. OF. toquier to touch, F. toquer (originally, a dialectic form of F. toucher) + seint (for sein) a bell, LL. signum, fr. L. signum a sign, signal. See Touch, and Sign.]

defs: An alarm bell, or the ringing of a bell for the purpose of alarm.
quotes: The loud tocsin tolled their last alarm.
